data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | International Spot Gold Lacks Bullish Momentum
data.description: International spot gold is experiencing insufficient bullish momentum, with rebound highs continuously declining. According to Jin10, before confirming a breakout, the market may continue to fluctuate downward.

data.title: Bitmine deposited 75,600 ETH into Ethereum's PoS staking pool, worth $176 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, after adding 100,000 ETH this afternoon, Bitmine just deposited 75,600 ETH ($176 million) into its Ethereum PoS staking. Currently, Bitmine has staked a total of 3.471 million ETH, representing 70% of their total ETH holdings (4.976 million ETH).

data.title: Bitcoin Rewards Program Launched for Employees by Fold
data.description:
Bitcoin financial services company Fold has announced a new employee Bitcoin rewards program, according to Foresight News. This initiative allows employers to offer periodic Bitcoin rewards with a built-in vesting mechanism, without needing to alter payroll systems or assume custody or compliance responsibilities. Fold manages the transfer, custody, and vesting of Bitcoin.

Steak 'n Shake has partnered with Fold to enable employees to earn Bitcoin as part of their compensation. Additionally, Bitcoin mining hosting company Simple Mining is utilizing the rewards program to distribute Bitcoin rewards based on employee tenure.

data.title: AVAX One announced its Q1 results: holding approximately 14 million AVAX tokens, revenue more than doubled quarter-over-quarter.
data.description: AVAX One, a Nasdaq-listed AVAX treasury company, announced preliminary results for the first quarter of 2026. Benefiting from Avalanche staking rewards and growth in Bitcoin mining, quarterly revenue more than doubled sequentially to approximately $2.4 million. Regarding asset allocation, the company currently holds approximately 14 million AVAX tokens, with over 90% pledged. Simultaneously, AVAX One has signed a letter of intent to build a 10MW Tier 3 AI/HPC data center in Alberta, Canada. The project is expected to be operational in the first quarter of 2027, leveraging low-cost natural gas and electricity resources to advance its dual-track strategy of "crypto asset rewards + computing infrastructure" for AI and digital assets. The company also added 220 Bitcoin mining rigs, increasing its hashrate to over 200 PH/s. (globenewswire)

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Average Revised to 210,750
data.description: The four-week average of initial jobless claims in the United States reached 210,750 for the week ending April 18, according to Jin10. The previous value was revised from 209,750 to 210,000.

data.title: Canada's March Industrial Product Price Index Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Canada's Industrial Product Price Index for March showed a monthly increase of 2.4%, surpassing the anticipated 1.9%, according to Jin10. The previous month's rate was recorded at 0.40%.

data.title: A senior Iranian presidential official said reaching an agreement with the US "will take time."
data.description: Seyed Abbas Mousavi, deputy chief of staff of the Iranian president, told the media that reaching an agreement with the United States would take time. Mousavi said that it should not be forgotten that Iran is currently at war, and that Iran is not facing trade negotiations, but rather "negotiations with an enemy." Iran needs time to fight for its rights and uphold its position. He said that negotiations "should not be rushed," and that it should be understood that Iran needs to safeguard its national interests and security based on full internal coordination. (Xinhua)

data.title: Iranian Official States Time Needed for U.S. Agreement
data.description: Iran's Deputy Chief of Staff for the President, Seyed Abbas Mousavi, stated that reaching an agreement with the United States requires time. According to Odaily, Mousavi emphasized that Iran is currently in a state of conflict, and the negotiations are not typical trade discussions but rather talks with an adversary. He highlighted the importance of Iran striving for its rights and maintaining its stance, which necessitates time. Mousavi advised against rushing the negotiation process, stressing the need for Iran to safeguard its national interests and security through thorough internal coordination.

data.title: WisdomTree's Digital Fund to Support LotusUSD Reserves
data.description: Lotus has announced that WisdomTree's Treasury Money Market Digital Fund (WTGXX), which tokenizes over $857 million in U.S. Treasuries, will be used to support LotusUSD reserves. According to NS3.AI, this move aims to establish a baseline lending yield. Data from RWA.xyz indicates that WTGXX offers a 7-day annual percentage yield (APY) of 3.49%. Lotus plans to open pre-deposit vaults in May 2026, with general availability to follow.

data.title: Tokenized Real-World Asset Market Nears $30 Billion Amid Institutional Interest
data.description: The tokenized real-world asset (RWA) market is nearing a valuation of $30 billion, driven by increasing institutional fund inflows, according to NS3.AI. Chainalysis reported that the asset-backed credit segment alone has reached $1 billion within a six-month period. The firm highlighted RWAs as a significant entry point for new institutional investors, indicating a growing trend of on-chain investment.

data.title: NEXO's Volume Pattern Suggests Potential Rally, Analyst Cautions
data.description: NEXO is exhibiting a cooling volume pattern that analyst Darkfost noted is similar to two setups in 2023, which led to rallies of approximately 150% and 65%. According to NS3.AI, Darkfost highlighted that the current macroeconomic and geopolitical conditions are more fragile than in 2023. Therefore, the signal requires confirmation through increased buying volume and price momentum.

data.title: Tether Freezes Significant USDT Holdings on Tron Network
data.description: Tether has recently taken action to freeze approximately 344 million USDT on two addresses within the Tron network. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this move was identified on April 23. The reasons behind the freeze have not been disclosed, and it remains unclear what prompted Tether to take this step. The incident highlights ongoing concerns about security and regulatory compliance within the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Hong Kong's Airstar Bank Rebrands to EleBank
data.description: Hong Kong's digital bank, Airstar Bank, has announced a rebranding and service upgrade, changing its name to EleBank. According to Foresight News, starting April 23, 2026, the bank's official English name will be changed from "Airstar Bank Limited" to "Ele Bank Limited."

data.title: Two Tron Addresses Freeze Over 344 Million USDT
data.description: Approximately one minute ago, Whale Alert detected the freezing of a Tron blockchain address holding 212,922,653 USDT. According to Odaily, shortly thereafter, another Tron address containing 131,288,800 USDT was also frozen.

data.title: Tether has frozen two wallets on the Tron blockchain, involving a total of 344 million USDT.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Tether has just frozen two wallets on the Tron chain, involving a total of 344 million USDT.

data.title: Spark's Native Token SPK Staking Surpasses 500 Million
data.description:
Spark announced on the X platform that the total staking volume of its native token, SPK, has exceeded 500 million, reaching 509,969,466 tokens. According to ChainCatcher, users can participate in the fourth season of the Spark Points Program by staking SPK and earn reward points.

Previously, due to a security incident involving rsETH, there was a continuous outflow of funds from Aave. Spark has absorbed some of the funds withdrawn by large investors and institutions from Aave.

data.title: India's Central Bank: Inflation Remains Within Tolerance Range Amid Rising Supply-Side Risks
data.description: India's central bank has reported that inflation is currently within its acceptable range. According to Jin10, the bank noted that supply-side disruptions have increased the upward risks to inflation. The central bank continues to monitor these developments closely to ensure economic stability.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts: Bitcoin ETF inflows turn positive across the board, IBIT enters the top 1% of ETF inflows.
data.description: Eric Balchunas, a senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, wrote on the X platform that Bitcoin ETF inflows have turned positive across the board, stating that "all rolling periods we track are positive," marking the first time in several months. BlackRock's IBIT has seen inflows of approximately $3 billion, placing it in the top 1% of all ETF inflow performance. However, Balchunas pointed out that several billion dollars more inflows are needed to return to the all-time high of $62.8 billion, but this at least indicates a significant recovery in investor sentiment towards Bitcoin ETFs and a restoration of market demand.

data.title: RealGo announced the completion of a funding round of over $3.5 million, with participation from Cogitent Ventures and others.
data.description: RealGo announced the completion of a funding round exceeding $3.5 million, with early-stage and strategic rounds supported by institutions and strategic partners including Animoca Brands, Cogitent Ventures, X21 Digital, Notch VC, and Becker Ventures. The funds raised will be primarily used to advance the infrastructure development of Meme 3.0, drive the upgrade and transformation of the Meme ecosystem, break away from its single-channel traffic attribute, and create an on-chain asset system that allows for collection, competition, social interaction, and monetization, ultimately realizing user ownership and value realization of Meme assets.

data.title: A Tron on-chain address holding 212,922,653 USDT has been frozen.
data.description: According to Whale Alert monitoring, about one minute ago, a Tron on-chain address holding 212,922,653 USDT was frozen.
